patch.value: Reorder classifyItem so BUG_LIKE_ITEM_TYPES default-Fixed runs before the weak change/update/refactor/improve keyword bucket, after the explicit security/removed/fix/feature checks.
Classifier misroutes Issues with CLI command-name titles (update/change) to Changed not Fixed

The keyword classifier scans [type, tags, title] and matches the Changed needle 'update'/'updated' against CLI command names like 'pm update' in Issue titles. pm-cli's Issue 'pm update doesn't accept --expected/--actual aliases that pm close accepts' was filed under Changed solely because its title contains the command word 'update'. Same class of defect as #19 (CLI flag tokens leaking into Added). Fix: let a bug-like item TYPE (issue/bug/bugfix/defect) win over the weak Changed keywords (update/change/refactor/improve), keeping explicit security/removed/fix/feature signals ahead; non-bug types (task/chore) still route 'update dependency ...' to Changed.

Issue/Bug/Defect titled with command words update/change route to Fixed; chore 'update dependency' stays Changed; explicit feature tag still wins; regression tests added; dist rebuilt; changelog:check passes

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Discovered while shipping pm-cli pm-1lws which was misfiled under Changed

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Same command-name-collision class as the #19 CLI-flag-token fix

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Item TYPE is a stronger classification signal than ambiguous title keywords that collide with command/flag names

patch.value: Reordered classifyItem: bug-like item type (issue/bug/bugfix/defect) now defaults to Fixed BEFORE the weak change/update/refactor/improve keyword bucket, while explicit security/removed/fix/feature signals stay ahead. Added regression tests for command-name keywords in Issue titles and for non-bug 'update dependency' chores staying Changed.
Issues titled after CLI commands (pm update ...) classify as Fixed; chores 'update dependency' stay Changed; explicit feature tag still wins
All 42 tests pass; typecheck + dist rebuilt
Classifier reordered so bug-like item types win over command-name-colliding Changed keywords; regression tests added; verified 42 tests green
